creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alexander Langer wrote:

> Thus spake Maxim Sobolev (sobomax@FreeBSD.org):
>
> > Well, why I don't see PORTVERSION increase in your patches?
>
> Because it's already 1.8 :P
>
> Ok. here the new features, without version bump:
>
> * Add NT/Linux/(Net|Open)BSD support (important!)
> * Volume control
> * Be able to confirm some command (e.g. delete files from queue)
> * Add some verbose messages
> * Show playing position
>
> That is at least how it seems.

Ok, it is much better and basically what I have asked for. Are you personally
tried it and can confirm that it works? If so I probably could commit it
shortly.

-Maxim
